effective_leave_policy.description: Effective leave policy name from the authoritative leave assignment.

leave_balance_days.description: Current leave balance in whole days.

base_salary.description: Base salary from the authoritative payroll assignment.

folder_missing_files.ordering: Any order; evaluated as a set.
folder_missing_files.description: Required document filenames missing from the employee lifecycle folder.

notice_defects.ordering: Any order; evaluated as a set.
notice_defects.description: Normalized notice defect codes found in messages or notification records.

audit_event_id.description: Audit log event that controls or confirms the clearance outcome.

escalation_owner.description: Team or role responsible for resolving the held clearance.

leave_precedence_source.description: Source-precedence label for the leave decision.

payroll_source_status.description: Status of the payroll assignment used for the salary decision.

excluded_payroll_assignment_ids.ordering: Any order; evaluated as a set.
excluded_payroll_assignment_ids.description: Payroll assignments excluded from the current clearance decision.

folder_required_tag_present.description: Whether all required lifecycle folder tags are present.

approval_closeout_gate.description: Closeout gate applied after approval history is reviewed.

final_control_result.description: Normalized control result for the final lifecycle clearance.
